# vimcheck: Diagnostics for Vaccine Impact Modelling Consortium burden and impact estimates

*vimcheck* is an R package for running diagnostic checks on burden
estimates submitted to the Vaccine Impact Modelling Consortium (VIMC),
and on vaccine impact estimates calculated by VIMC.

## Installation

You can install the development version of *vimcheck* from the VIMC
R-universe with:

``` r
installation from R-universe
install.packages(
  "vimcheck", 
  repos = c(
    "https://vimc.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org"
  )
)
```

or from GitHub [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("vimc/vimcheck")
```

## Quick start

WIP.

## Related projects

VIMC impact assessment workflows are described in Echeverria-Londono et
al. ([2021](#ref-echeverria-londono2021)).

## References

Echeverria-Londono, Susy, Xiang Li, Jaspreet Toor, Margaret J. De
Villiers, Shevanthi Nayagam, Timothy B. Hallett, Kaja Abbas, et al.
2021. “How Can the Public Health Impact of Vaccination Be Estimated?”
*BMC Public Health* 21 (1): 2049.
<https://doi.org/10.1186/s12889-021-12040-9>.

# Package index

## Package-level documentation

- [`vimcheck`](vimcheck-package.md)
  [`vimcheck-package`](vimcheck-package.md) : vimcheck: Diagnostics for
  Vaccine Impact Modelling Consortium Burden and Impact Estimates

## Diagnostic functions

Package diagnostic functions.

- [`basic_burden_sanity()`](basic_burden_sanity.md) : Sanity checks on
  burden estimates
- [`check_demography_alignment()`](check_demography_alignment.md) :
  Check incoming burden cohort size against interpolated population
- [`validate_complete_incoming_files()`](validate_complete_incoming_files.md)
  : Validate files in a burden estimate
- [`validate_file_dict_template()`](validate_file_dict_template.md) :
  Validate file dictionary template
- [`validate_template_alignment()`](validate_template_alignment.md) :
  Check incoming burden set against template

## Plotting functions

Package plotting functions.

- [`plot_compare_demography()`](plotting.md)
  [`plot_age_patterns()`](plotting.md)
  [`plot_global_burden_decades()`](plotting.md)
  [`plot_global_burden()`](plotting.md)
  [`plot_coverage_set()`](plotting.md) [`plot_fvp()`](plotting.md) :
  Plot burden and impact diagnostics
- [`theme_vimc()`](plotting_theme.md) : Plotting theme for vimcheck

## Internal functions

Internal helper functions.

- [`make_novax_scenario()`](helpers.md) : Make data for a no-vaccination
  scenario

## Data

Package data.

- [`eg_burden_template`](eg_burden_template.md) : Example of VIMC burden
  template provided to modellers
- [`eg_wpp`](eg_wpp.md) : Example of UN-WPP time-series data

## Constants

Package constants.

- [`file_dict_colnames`](constants.md)
  [`scenario_data_colnames`](constants.md) : Package constants
